spec_match.rationale: It demonstrates and logs speculation rules prefetches being intercepted by the Service Worker fetch handler using the actual browser APIs.

interactive.rationale: Provides buttons to register/unregister the worker and dynamically inject speculation rules, logging captured events.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Matches the index page blurb describing the capability of Service Workers to see speculation rules prefetch.

edge_cases.rationale: Handles checking for Service Worker and Speculation Rules support, registering with scope '/' and warning about blob: worker policy blocks.

references.rationale: Correctly links back to the feature index and the ChromeStatus entry.

design_system.rationale: Follows the design system rules using standard variables and styles.

summary: A perfectly conforming, highly interactive demo that showcases Service Workers intercepting real speculation rules prefetches using Chrome 138 APIs.
